title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Cost Woes Linger
text: Mondelez's (MDLZ) first-quarter 2022 results reflect higher earnings and revenues, with the latter gaining on buyouts and solid organic revenues. Management expects input cost inflation to persist.

title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Mondelez (MDLZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 13.51% and 3.77%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Mondelez International, Inc. (MDLZ) CEO Dirk Van de Put on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mondelez International, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDLZ ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 26, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Shep Dunlap - Vice President, Investor Relations Dirk Van de Put - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Luca Zaramella - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants John Baumgartner - Mizuho Securities Ken Goldman - JPMorgan Andrew Lazar - Barclays Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Chris Growe - Stifel Jason English - Goldman Sachs Michael Lavery - Piper Sandler Alexia Howard - Bernstein Operator Good day, and welcome to the Mondelez International First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Today's call is scheduled to last about one hour, including remarks by the Mondelez management and the question-and-answer session.

title: Mondelez acquires Mexican confectionary business Ricolino in $1.3 billion deal
text: Mondelez International Inc. mdlez announced Monday that it has entered into an agreement with Grupo Bimbo to acquire Mexican confectionary business Ricolino for $1.3 billion. The deal will be funded through debt and cash on hand.

title: Mondelez to buy Ricolino for $1.3 billion
text: Mondelez International Inc said on Monday it had entered into an agreement with Grupo Bimbo to acquire its confectionery business, Ricolino, for around $1.3 billion.

title: Mondelēz International Agrees to Acquire Ricolino, Mexico's Leading Confectionery Company, from Grupo Bimbo
text: CHICAGO, April 25, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) today announced it has entered into an agreement with Grupo Bimbo to acquire its confectionery business, Ricolino, for approximately $1.3 billion USD. Ricolino is a growing business with a leading confectionery position in Mexico. The acquisition will transform Mondelēz International's business in the high-priority Mexico market to accelerate growth and scale in core snacking categories.

title: Mondelēz International Announces Investor Update on May 10, 2022
text: CHICAGO, April 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) today announced Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Dirk Van de Put and members of the senior leadership team will provide updates on the company's business strategy and capital allocation plans during an investor update on Tuesday, May 10, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. EDT.

title: What's in the Offing for Mondelez (MDLZ) in Q1 Earnings?
text: Mondelez International's (MDLZ) first-quarter 2022 results are likely to reflect gains from buyouts and high at-home consumption, though the elevated cost and supply-chain woes are concerning.

title: Mondelez International: Fighting Inflation With Oreos
text: I explain why the nature of Mondelez International's business helps to mitigate the detrimental effects of inflation. I concede that there are a few valid concerns regarding the company, and address some of the possible risks when investing in Mondelez International stock.

title: Earnings Preview: Mondelez (MDLZ) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Mondelez (MDLZ) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Mondelez: Working To Take A Bigger Bite Out Of The Snack Market
text: Short-term challenges from cost inflation and potential reduction in at-home snacking as consumer mobility rises. Long-term growth is supported by several factors including acquisitions, brand building, and emerging market exposure.

title: 6 Consumer Defensive Stocks Gurus Are Putting in Their Easter Baskets
text: Ahead of Easter weekend celebrations, a Christian holiday that commemorates the death and resurrection of Jesus Christ, investors may be interested in companies that benefit from egg hunts and other festivities as high inflation, interest rates and the Russia-Ukraine conflict continue to affect markets.

title: Mondelez: Underappreciated Upside Potential
text: DCF analysis indicates that Mondelez is reasonably priced. Emerging market growth and channel & product expansion provide material actionable upside.

title: Mondelēz International to Report Q1 2022 Financial Results on April 26, 2022
text: CHICAGO, April 14, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) will release its first quarter 2022 financial results on Tuesday, April 26, 2022 at 4:05 p.m. ET and will host a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET that day.

title: CHIPS AHOY!® TEAMS UP WITH BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS OF AMERICA TO LAUNCH "FOLLOW YOUR ART" CAMPAIGN WITH $1MM DONATION OVER THREE YEARS TO FUND ART PROGRAMS
text: "Follow Your Art" campaign helps more teens gain access to the artistic tools, resources, and inspiration they need to follow their art NEW YORK , April 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chips Ahoy! is a brand that is "Here for Happy" and recognizes that arts and creativity help many teens find their happy place.
